edgeTypes.label: FINDING_FOR
edgeTypes.description: Links an audit finding to the compliance control it relates to

edgeTypes.label: SATISFIES
edgeTypes.description: Links a compliance control to the regulatory requirement or policy it addresses

edgeTypes.label: AFFECTS
edgeTypes.description: Links a regulatory change to the policies it impacts and may require updating

edgeTypes.label: DEADLINE_FOR
edgeTypes.description: Links a deadline to the legal matter it applies to
